channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T20:32Z — 1263 outages, 105,319 customers, 170 fair-weather, 16 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 3743 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | BGE: 3136 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | BGE: 2945 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 2780 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 2570 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
